company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a public (shared/free) email service provider — not a product or startup called 'Alicesec'. They offer email addresses under the punkproof.com domain to the general public, positioning themselves as a legitimate (non-throwaway) free email host that prohibits spam and illegal activity.
company.raw_notes: Homepage text is that of a generic public email hosting provider. Key signals: (1) They explicitly say 'public email service'; (2) They forbid sending messages to the internet (suggesting inbound/internal only, or a sandboxed service); (3) They ask not to be blocklisted, distinguishing themselves from throwaway/disposable email services; (4) They have an abuse ticket system; (5) There is no mention of any company, product, or brand called 'Alicesec' anywhere on the site. The org_name 'Alicesec' appears to be a name the individual typed at signup, not a real company associated with this domain.
